# PronoFoot AI

> AI-powered football predictions platform for French-speaking Africa. Analyzes 500+ stats per match using Claude AI to generate daily predictions across 7 betting markets. Based in Cameroon.

For complete documentation, see [llms-full.txt](https://www.parifoot.online/llms-full.txt).

## Key Pages

- [Daily Predictions](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/predictions): AI predictions for today's matches — 7 markets per match
- [AI Performance Stats](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/stats): Full win/loss transparency by market, confidence tier, and risk level
- [AI Lab](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/ai-lab): Pattern analyzer, smart bet generator, suspicious match detector
- [Combo Builder](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/bet-builder): Auto-generated Safe/Balanced/Risky betting combos
- [Daily Report](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/rapport-du-jour): Best value, safest bet, underdog pick, accumulator of the day
- [Blog](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/blog): Match previews, recaps, league analysis, betting guides
- [VIP Plans](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/vip): Premium predictions from 2,500 FCFA/week
- [Livescore](https://www.parifoot.online/fr/livescore): Real-time scores, auto-refreshing

## Prediction Markets

1X2 (Match Result), Over 2.5 Goals, Over 1.5 Goals, BTTS, Home to Score, Away to Score, Best Pick

## Leagues

Cameroon MTN Elite One/Two, CAF Champions League, AFCON, Premier League, La Liga, Ligue 1, Serie A, Bundesliga, UCL, UEL

## Contact

- Telegram: https://t.me/pronofootai
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/pronofootai
